# Excluded Structures {-}
```{r params, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
#| label: tbl-param
#| tbl-cap: "Excluded Structures"
#| warning: false

library("flextable")

data <- read.csv("data/excluded_structures.csv", check.names=FALSE)
ft <- flextable(data)
ft <- bg(ft, bg = "#008270", part = "header")
ft <- color(ft, color = "white", part = "header")
ft <- set_caption(ft)
ft <- width(ft, width = 1)
ft 
```
